sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48265" key="qeopoii/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεοποι-ΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n48265.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making of gods</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.9</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of their statutes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.13</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n48265.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">being made divine</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἵνα κατὰ ἀφαίρεσιν τοῦ βροτοῦ ἡ θ. ἡμῶν νοῆται</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:27p.483M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27p.483M.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
